news.t: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges

holdings.infoBox: BBSC is an equity ETF with a total of 732 individual holdings. The top holdings are TTM Technologies stock at 0.97%, SiTime at 0.74%, Semtech at 0.71%, DigitalOcean Holdings at 0.67%, and Moog Inc. at 0.59%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan BetaBuilders U.S. Small Cap Equity Fund (BBSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of US small cap companies. BBSC was launched on Nov 16, 2020 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
infoTable: Morningstar US Small Cap Target Market Exposure Extended Index

data.title: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges
data.text: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the upcoming exchange listing transfer of 14 ETFs from their current exchanges including the NASDAQ Stock Market L...
